_meta.purpose: Authoritative live state for JobTrackr-CV. Read at session start. Update on significant changes.

project.name: JobTrackr-CV
project.summary: AI-assisted job discovery + CV tailoring SaaS. One codebase, one Supabase DB, three services (web/Vercel, worker/Fly, cv-backend/Fly).

web.stack: Next.js 16 (Turbopack) App Router, Tailwind v4, Supabase browser client
web.deploy: git push origin main — auto-deploys to production

worker.notes: Stage-4b filter is title-only + optional teaser rescue (driven by profile.must_include_phrases, migration 046). Primary SEEK: seekDirect (curl_cffi Chrome-124 TLS, no proxy); Apify actor: fallback only via profile.seek_method='actor'. Careerjet: direct HTML scraping via curl_cffi (API abandoned to avoid tracking URL IP-blocks). Adzuna: API teasers by default (profile.adzuna_method='api'); opt-in 'direct' mode scrapes /details/<id> HTML for full JDs (migration 047, cap 50). Full-JD threshold: 1400 chars. Jora: disabled (OOM on 512MB VM).

cv_backend.stack: FastAPI, Python 3.11, ReportLab, Supabase service-role client

build_state.current_phase: phase-13 — monetization: Stripe subscriptions + usage metering (IN PROGRESS, not yet production)
build_state.billing_high_level: Adding paid subscriptions (Stripe, AUD) gating the platform — not AI tokens (BYOK). Plans: 3-day card-upfront TRIAL (3 tailored CVs + 3 cover letters, 1 profile, 1 run) → WEEKLY (50 unique / 75 total CVs + letters, 5 profiles, 30 runs) → MONTHLY (250 unique / 375 total, 10 profiles, 120 runs) → UNLIMITED (∞, higher price). Total = unique × 1.5. Tailored CV and cover letter are SEPARATE buckets, equal caps (either/or). Caps reset per Stripe billing period (counted by current_period_start). Auto-renew ON (Stripe default; trial auto-converts after 3 days; subscriptions auto-renew each period). On cancel/expiry → READ-ONLY (existing CVs/letters viewable, no new analyses). Existing role='beta' users grandfathered via a comp subscription with a 14-day grace. Enforcement is at the 4 web-layer choke points only (createProfile, profiles/[id]/run, jobs/[id]/analyze, jobs/[id]/cover-letter); cv-backend + worker untouched. Migration 051_billing.sql. Pricing numbers are placeholders to finalize before go-live.
build_state.production_writer: w8_verified (W8+) — active via TAILORED_CV_WRITER=w8_verified Fly secret on jobtrackr-cv-api. All /internal/analyze runs use this. Beta /internal/analyze-eval is a separate isolated harness.
build_state.production_ats_scorer: S1 (deterministic: 50pt keyword + 35pt experience + 15pt formatting, presence-aware). 2026-05-31: tailored ATS score is now computed by the SAME deterministic scorer + SAME baseline as the original (run_tailored_rescoring), guaranteeing a monotonic, genuine lift. The prior AI re-match (Step 6.5b) was REMOVED — its fresh non-deterministic cv_jd_matching call could push the tailored score BELOW the original (the 'bizarre regression' bug). New method: experience signal frozen (raw_match_score rides through untouched — tailoring surfaces keywords, doesn't add experience); keyword coverage promotes any missed JD keyword that literally appears in the tailored CV AND is not on the cannot_inject honesty blocklist (generalises beyond the feasibility allowlist); formatting floored at the original's (a missing-contact artifact can't manufacture a phantom drop). Production now matches the beta /analyze-eval S1 harness exactly. NEEDS FLY DEPLOY.
build_state.last_shipped: 2026-06-10 — JD-analysis quality sweep + summary honesty gates (6 commits deployed). KEY DIAGNOSIS: Australian Unity AIN dropped 86%→57%→69% on the SAME JD across 3 runs. Root cause: (a) lexicon is curated-by-phrasing — new JD phrasings (NDISWC abbrev, 'flexibility for X shifts') leaked through as skills; (b) JD analysis prompt is IT-centric, never extracts care skills from prose-heavy responsibilities → empty domain_knowledge bucket; (c) presence-aware ATS scoring (May 30 + Jun 3, 1dbf4a6+8c87f56) amplifies AI variance — empty domain → scale 50/15=3.33×, populated → scale 50/35=1.43× = 20+ point swings on tiny AI noise. SHIPPED TODAY: (1) 6fca5e3 — lexicon: NDISWC abbrev + 'flexibility for X shifts' families to noise. (2) 8c79922 — enrich_required_skills_from_jd_body(): deterministic JD-body scan against vertical lexicon canonicals (nursing.json domain_knowledge); fires BEFORE post_process_jd_analysis; surfaces care skills the LLM missed; closes redistribution variance. (3) 1336734 — three honesty gates in writers.py: _tools_attributable_to_employer (S2 must not say 'at Uniting using BESTMed' when tools used at Jesmond), _cv_has_hospital_experience gate (skip HOSPITAL bridge if CV has no acute markers — was fabricating 'acute clinical settings'), _classify_jd_setting tightened (weak signals 'acute care'/'hospital setting' require primary band; corporate boilerplate no longer promotes residential AIN to HOSPITAL). (4) 21667b6 — three pattern recognisers in post_process.py: _split_conditional_phrase + demoter (strips 'or willingness to apply' and moves to preferred), _looks_like_language (forces 'cantonese language' etc. to technical/Other Skills, not Care Skills), _is_au_unit_code (HLTHPS007/CHCCCS015/HLTAID011 patterns → credential sidecar). 703 tests green. Production v??? on jobtrackr-cv-api. EARLIER: 2026-06-05 Phase 3B lexicon foundation, 2026-06-02 post-verify skills hygiene + Awards bullet format, 2026-05-30 nursing sub-type labels + cover-letter hardening + adaptive PDF layout.
build_state.next_session: FOCUS: deep-dive on JD/CV categorisation, Professional Summary composition, and keyword-feasibility/injection pipelines — user wants to improve all three. See cv-backend/docs/NEXT_SESSION_INSTRUCTIONS.md for the full architecture map + diagnostic plan + improvement candidates. NO uncommitted changes pending. Re-analyse a nursing JD first to verify today's three deploys behave as expected before changing more.
build_state.completed_summary: All core phases 0–12 complete: infra, DB migrations (001–048), CV upload, BYOK AI keys, full 9-step analysis pipeline, tailored CV PDF (w8_verified production writer), cover letter generation, Gmail/Outlook OAuth dispatch, applications outbox, voice-directed drafting, analytics funnel, pipeline automation (gate-based auto-tailoring), worker sources (SEEK/Adzuna/Careerjet/Greenhouse/Lever), PipelineDonut (5 lenses), SmartFeed/SmartToolbar, 5-theme system, per-profile source selection, client-side instant filtering on both boards, driving-distance feature.

client_side_filtering.summary: Both dashboard (/dashboard) and profile board (/dashboard/profiles/[id]/jobs) use instant client-side filtering.
client_side_filtering.pattern: Server fetches all ≤200 non-dismissed jobs once, computes progress/pipelineState/atsBand. Client component holds full set and applies filterJobs+sortJobs in useMemo. Stage/triage/sort/keywords use shallowSetParams (History API) — no server round-trip. Location/posted_within/dismissed still hit server.

pipeline_automation.lifecycle: DISCOVERED → JD_CHECK → ROLE_CHECK → INITIAL_ATS_GATE(60) → TAILORED_CV → FINAL_ATS_GATE(70) → COVER_LETTER+EMAIL → APPLICATION_READY → READY_TO_SEND/APPLY → SENT/APPLIED
pipeline_automation.gates_save_cost: JD_CHECK: zero AI cost; ROLE_CHECK: zero AI cost; INITIAL_GATE: saves ~3 AI calls; FINAL_GATE: saves ~2 AI calls
pipeline_automation.cover_letter: Co-generated with email body+subject in ONE AI call. Voice profile (fingerprint + sample) drives register.

billing.summary: Stripe subscriptions (AUD) monetize the platform. Enforcement lives ONLY in the web layer at 4 choke points; cv-backend/worker are unaware of billing.
billing.model: Two metered buckets (tailored_cv, cover_letter) + profiles (live count of search_profiles) + runs (per-period event count). consume_usage() Postgres RPC does an atomic cap-check + reservation (FOR UPDATE on subscription). Reserve on trigger (pending) → trigger on analysis_runs/cover_letters status flips to committed (completed) or voided (failed). Dangling pending self-heals after 1h TTL in the count.
billing.entitlement_resolution: founder/admin → unlimited bypass. status='trialing' → TRIAL limits (3/3/1/1) regardless of chosen plan, window = trial period. status='active' → chosen plan limits. status='past_due' → access continues (dunning banner) until Stripe moves to canceled/unpaid. plan='comp' (grandfathered beta) → unlimited until current_period_end (14-day grace) then read-only. canceled/unpaid/no-sub → READ-ONLY + redirect to /onboarding/plan.

css_theming.rule: Always use var(--brand), border-border, text-text, bg-surface. NEVER hardcode hex.
css_theming.default: Notion is the project default (getStoredTheme() + the FOUC script in app/layout.tsx fall back to 'notion' when nothing is stored; an explicit 'default' choice is still honoured).
css_theming.public_pages: Landing (app/landing.css scoped to .landing), auth (login/signup inline styles) and privacy do NOT consume theme tokens — they were hand-restyled to the Notion palette (lavender canvas #E6E0F5 / surface #F4EEFB, purple #5645D4 accent, deep purple/navy #241A5C dark sections) + Manrope/Noto Serif. Changing the Notion theme later won't auto-update these.

decisions.decision: Two services — cv-backend stays Python (FastAPI + ReportLab). Preserves 100% of pipeline logic.
Shared Supabase project with production JobTrackr. FK from analysis_runs.job_id → jobs.id requires same DB.
BYOK Anthropic + OpenAI; no platform AI credits. Zero ongoing cost; user controls spend.
HMAC-signed internal API between web and cv-backend. Simpler than JWKS; one caller.
Realtime via Supabase postgres_changes on analysis_runs. Same pattern as cv-magic; no polling tax.
Stale strategy: new run on (user, job) marks prior runs is_stale=true. Re-run is user-triggered only.
Preferred AI provider stored in localStorage (not DB). No migration; preference is per-browser.
Dropdowns inside overflow:hidden use createPortal + position:fixed + getBoundingClientRect.
Cover letter: single rich AI call + verbatim voice sample + intent rubric + anti-patterns. Replaces 3-pass pipeline that produced mechanical output.
Monetize the platform via Stripe subscriptions (AUD), NOT AI tokens — BYOK stays for now. Subscription bounds infra/Apify cost (job discovery, scraping, pipeline orchestration).
BYOK is transitional — planned removal in the future (platform will supply AI keys). Until then D3 holds. When removed, AI cost becomes the platform's and plan caps/pricing must be revisited.
Prioritise direct scraping (seekDirect / Adzuna direct / Careerjet HTML) over the Apify actor to cut per-run cost — actor remains fallback only. Reinforces why runs are capped per plan.

Billing enforcement is web-layer-only at 4 choke points (createProfile, run, analyze, cover-letter). cv-backend + worker stay billing-unaware. consume_usage() RPC + DB triggers are the authoritative meter (reserve/commit/void).
On subscription cancel/expiry → READ-ONLY (existing artifacts viewable, no new work) rather than hard-lock. Grandfather existing beta users with a 14-day comp subscription.

operational_notes.title: Migration tracking is CLI-untracked
operational_notes.detail: All migrations applied manually via Supabase SQL editor. If supabase link is ever set up, run supabase migration repair to mark all migrations as applied before using CLI workflows.

operational_notes.title: bullmq + ioredis in web/package.json are legitimate
operational_notes.detail: Used by web/src/app/api/profiles/[id]/run/route.ts and web/src/lib/actions.ts for BullMQ queue trigger. Server-side only, do not remove.

operational_notes.title: Scrape pipeline observability: run_logs.current_stage + log_lines
operational_notes.detail: current_stage written by setStage() at each transition, cleared on finishRunLog. log_lines (jsonb) streams console output via append_run_log_line() Postgres RPC. UI: LiveRunStatus banner + LiveLogConsole (collapsible). RunNotifier toast in dashboard layout. Polling: LiveRunStatus 3s/12s, LiveLogConsole 4s+1.5s, RunNotifier 3s.

operational_notes.title: curl_cffi bypasses Cloudflare from Fly datacenter without proxy
operational_notes.detail: Python curl_cffi impersonating Chrome 124 TLS bypasses Cloudflare from Fly.io IPs. SEEK + Careerjet return HTTP 200. TypeScript spawns python3 scripts/fetch_jd.py as subprocess; JSON on stdout. Subprocess overhead ~200ms — negligible vs HTTP round-trip.

operational_notes.title: Careerjet API replaced with direct HTML scraping due to jobviewtrack.com blocks
operational_notes.detail: Careerjet's API uses jobviewtrack.com for click tracking, which strictly blocks Fly.io Datacenter IPs with 404s. To avoid relying on an Apify residential proxy, the adapter was rewritten (2026-05-27) to scrape careerjet.com.au HTML directly using curl_cffi. WARNING: HTML scraping is fragile. If the DOM changes or Careerjet strictly rate-limits Fly's IP under high load, the documented fallback plan is to revert to the API adapter and use an Apify Residential proxy.

operational_notes.title: Auth is password-only; master admin account
operational_notes.detail: Magic-link (signInWithOtp) removed from /auth/login 2026-05-25 — email+password only. Master admin: admin@jobtrackr.com (role 'founder' in public.users). Password NOT stored here; set/rotate via Supabase Dashboard → Authentication → Users (Add user, Auto Confirm). New auth users get a public.users row automatically via the on_auth_user_created trigger (default role 'beta'); promote with: update public.users set role='founder' where id=(select id from auth.users where email='admin@jobtrackr.com'). Admin route pages (/dashboard/admin, /dashboard/admin/metrics) still exist but are unlinked from the sidebar.

operational_notes.title: Never import runtime values from a 'use client' module into a server component
operational_notes.detail: Next.js returns a client-reference proxy (not the real value), so arithmetic → NaN and the render crashes. This caused the instructions ?step=N 'This page couldn't load' bug. Fix pattern: keep shared constants/data in a neutral plain module (e.g. web/src/lib/setupSteps.ts) that both server and client import.

operational_notes.title: Dashboard empty state has two modes (gate = !hasAnyJob)
operational_notes.detail: web/src/app/(dashboard)/dashboard/page.tsx: when no jobs exist, coreComplete = status.profile && status.cv && status.aiKey. !coreComplete → FirstRunScreen (Get-set-up wizard / SetupCards). coreComplete → ReadyToScanScreen (create/run a search-profile CTA + the How-it-works deck). The How-it-works deck is the shared component web/src/components/onboarding/HowItWorksDeck.tsx (built on SwipeDeck.tsx) reused by both this screen and the instructions 'How it works' tab.

operational_notes.title: Profile Location field uses Google Places via a server-side proxy
operational_notes.detail: web/src/app/api/places/autocomplete/route.ts (auth-gated GET ?q=) calls the Places Autocomplete API (New) at places.googleapis.com/v1/places:autocomplete, restricted includedRegionCodes:['au'] + includedPrimaryTypes:['(cities)']. Key is PLACES_API_KEY (server-only, NOT NEXT_PUBLIC_) so it never reaches the browser. UI: web/src/components/LocationAutocomplete.tsx — controlled input + 300ms-debounced dropdown, still free-typeable (Remote etc.), strips trailing ', Australia' on select to keep the 'Sydney NSW' shape the worker sources expect; replaces the plain input in ProfileForm.tsx. Requires 'Places API (New)' enabled in GCP (distinct from legacy Places API) + billing. Do NOT add an HTTP-referrer key restriction — calls are server→Google from Vercel IPs; an API restriction (limit to Places API New) is fine.

known_issues.title: DOCX upload fails with ERR_TIMED_OUT to Supabase Storage
known_issues.workaround: Convert DOCX to PDF before uploading. PDF path fully functional.

known_issues.title: GPT-5* family forced to temperature=1 → noisier output
known_issues.detail: OpenAI enforces temperature=1 on gpt-5* (HTTP 400 otherwise). We strip temperature so call succeeds; user trades determinism for capability. Prefer Anthropic Sonnet 4.6.

known_issues.title: Jora adapter hangs Chromium on 512MB Fly worker — disabled
known_issues.detail: Commented out in worker/src/sources/index.ts. Fix: (A) fly scale memory 1024; (B) rewrite to HTTP/SSR parse; (C) drop Jora.

deferred_features.title: Tier 4 user-initiated JD URL fetch
deferred_features.status: built, not wired — no API route calls it
deferred_features.to_activate: Create POST /api/jobs/scrape-url. Wire to 'Fetch from URL' button on JobEditModal.

deferred_features.title: Multi-source shared jobs pool for scale (1000s of users)
deferred_features.status: designed, not built — current per-user live fetch is fine for 10-20 test users
deferred_features.reconsider: When approaching 50-100 daily active users or source rate-limit errors appear.
